title: In an Item Card, be able to select columns included in a text widget via settings
excerpt: It would be very useful when using a text widget in an item card, to be able to select which columns are included via the settings option. This is currently something that is available for the Information Widget, and it …

posts.author: kathleenwolfer (Kathleen Wolfer)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be very useful when using a text widget in an item card, to be able to select which columns are included via the settings option. This is currently something that is available for the Information Widget, and it would be great if this were also available for the the Text Widget.

We use the Item Card to conveniently bring together the information needed for a group of users, and the useability is better than creating a customized view of the board. Being able to select which columns are included in the text widget would make things ten times better. The reason we want to use the text widget, is because the long form text can all be displayed in the box, which in our case can sometimes be paragraphs of text.
